hypothesis_en: The minutes of yesterday's session have been distributed and I must ask you if there is any comment.
reference_en: the sitting is resumed the minutes of yesterday's sitting have been circulated and I have to ask you if there are any comments on the minutes Mr Rübig
source_es: el acta de la sesión de ayer ha sido distribuida y debo preguntarle si hay alguna observación (1.12) el Señor Rübig tiene la palabra
